Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Im building out the event log organized by order starting with Order 1001 and documenting each event order creation item picks from different warehouses and dispatch with timestamps resources and the staff involved

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Continuing with Order 1002 Im tracking multiple events including picks from different warehouses two separate dispatches to different carriers arrivals invoicing and payments making sure to sequence them correctly by timestamp since some events on the same day need careful ordering

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Now looking at Order 1003 which follows a similar pattern with picks from multiple warehouses a single dispatch arrival invoice and payment

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Order 1004 is incomplete it was created and picked but has no delivery or payment records

Name: Validation - NE
Text: Order 1005 is also incomplete with creation and picks recorded but the dispatch appears to be cut off

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Im thinking about the table structure I need Case ID Event ID as a sequence number the activity type timestamp resource ID and name role and related objects

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: I should also consider adding an Order Fully Picked milestone as an optional event

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: For the payment resource Ill treat it as the customer making the payment so the resource would be the customer ID with a customer role
